headline: VICI Properties: The Caesars Shadow Is Your Buying Window Into This Income Machine
summary: VICI Properties remains resilient amid Las Vegas headwinds, delivering solid Q1 results and raising full-year AFFO guidance. Read why VICI stock is a Buy.
